summary: Completed testing of SnapRoad Driver App features. All 20 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed: Interactive map with OpenStreetMap rendering, all 4 navigation tabs (Map, Routes, Rewards, Profile), Rewards tab with offers and badges, Profile tab with user info/car customization/achievements, Settings within Profile.

issues: Console warning: validateDOMNesting - button cannot appear as descendant of button (line ~152 in DriverApp). Not causing visible issues but should be fixed for proper HTML structure.

critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are working correctly:
✓ /driver route displays interactive map with OpenStreetMap/Leaflet tiles from basemaps.cartocdn.com
✓ Map shows 5 offer markers with gem icons and % off labels
✓ /api/badges returns correct data format with badges array, earned_count, and total_count
✓ /api/user/car returns car data with category, variant, color, and owned_colors
✓ /api/offers returns valid offers array with business_name, business_type, description, etc.
✓ Navigation between all 4 tabs (Map, Routes, Rewards, Profile) works correctly
✓ Profile tab renders user info (name, level, plan), car customization (My Car section), achievements
✓ Rewards tab renders offers (Shell, Starbucks, Quick Shine, Groupon) and badges (0/160 collection)
✓ Settings within Profile loads without crashing - shows Plan, Notifications, Voice Settings, Map Widgets, Fuel Tracker, Help & Support
MOCKED: All backend data uses mock data from /app/backend/services/mock_data.py - no live database connection

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Map, all tabs, profile, rewards, settings all render correctly

seed_data_creation: Used API calls to set plan_selected=true and car_selected=true to bypass onboarding for main app testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver app testing complete. All tabs working: Map (OSM tiles + offer markers), Routes, Rewards (Offers/Challenges/Badges/Car Studio sub-tabs), Profile (Overview/Score/Fuel/Settings). To bypass onboarding: call POST /api/user/plan with {plan:'basic'} and POST /api/user/car. OpenStreetMap uses CartoDBn dark tiles. Mock data serves all endpoints.
mocked_api_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - /api/badges, /api/offers, /api/user/car, /api/user/profile all return mock data from services/mock_data.py

backend_tests: GET /api/badges - PASS (returns success with badges array, earned_count=0, total_count=5)
GET /api/user/car - PASS (returns category=sedan, variant=sedan-classic, color=midnight-black, owned_colors)
GET /api/offers - PASS (returns 6 offers with business_name, business_type, description)
GET /api/user/profile - PASS (returns user with id, name, gems, level, safety_score)
GET /api/user/onboarding-status - PASS (returns account_created, plan_selected, car_selected, onboarding_complete)
frontend_tests: Map View: Map container present, 20 OSM tiles loaded, OSM attribution visible, 5 offer markers
Navigation Tabs: Found all 4 tabs (Map, Routes, Rewards, Profile)
Rewards Tab: Shows Offers/Challenges/Badges/Car Studio sub-tabs, nearby offers list
Badges Sub-tab: Shows Badge Collection 0/160, Recent Badges section
Profile Tab: Shows Driver name, Level 1, BASIC plan, stats, My Car, Achievements
Settings: Shows Your Plan, Notifications, Voice Settings, Map Widgets, Fuel Tracker, Help & Support
